dependencies: Reliance on third-party distributors for media content distribution
Dependence on television and cable networks, satellite providers, digital streaming partners
Reliance on third-party venues for live events
Dependence on Endeavor for various operational functions under Services Agreement
risks: Failure to maintain or renew key distribution agreements could adversely affect ability to distribute media content
Reliance on limited number of distributors, licensees, and partners increases exposure to counterparty risk
Dependence on third-party technology platforms for streaming services
Supply chain disruptions from catastrophic events, severe weather, pandemics
Reliance on Endeavor services under Services Agreement - termination could impact operations

regulatory_risks: Licensing laws for athletes and promotion of MMA events
Athletic commission regulations and medical clearances required for live events
Compliance with U.S. Foreign Corrupt Practices Act (FCPA)
Compliance with U.K. Bribery Act 2010
Anti-money laundering and countering terrorist financing rules
Data privacy and protection laws (GDPR, CCPA, state privacy laws)
Cybersecurity laws and regulations (NIS 2 Directive)
FCC regulations applicable to broadcast programming
Gaming laws and regulations in various jurisdictions
Immigration restrictions and visa requirements for talent and personnel
Employment and labor laws (worker classification, minimum wage, discrimination)
Americans with Disabilities Act and UK Disability Discrimination Act compliance
Environmental protection regulations
Antitrust and fair competition laws
International trade controls, sanctions, and embargoes
Tax laws and regulations (including OECD Pillar Two global minimum tax)
Content production incentive programs and compliance requirements
Marketing and advertising regulations (including gambling-related advertising)
Children's Online Privacy Protection Act (COPPA)
Video Privacy Protection Act (VPPA)
Telephone Consumer Protection Act
Cookie and tracking technology regulations (ePrivacy Directive)
Digital Services Act (DSA) in EU
Data Act in EU
SEC disclosure and corporate governance requirements
Sarbanes-Oxley Act compliance
NYSE listing requirements

sanction_risks: U.S., European Union and United Kingdom trade and economic sanctions exposure
Counter-sanctions enacted by sanctioned countries (e.g., Russia)
Restrictions on transactions in certain markets and with certain entities
Impact of sanctions on distribution agreements and business relationships
Compliance with sanctions laws could restrict business activities
Russia subsidiary operations subject to sanctions risks
